title: spur recipe
description: adds a recipe for the spur in create numismatics
body:
# this mod needs create, and, create: numismatics

this mod only adds a recipe to the spur and nothing else.

the recipe uses one copper nugget

![crafting recipe for the spur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28b85480edefc4520fced580de954d0d759aca1.png)
